stepHeader.scriptSubtitle: Import a script, parse it into scenes
stepHeader.styleSubtitle: Set the global visual aesthetic and palette
stepHeader.castSubtitle: View characters, scenes, and props appearing in this episode
stepHeader.storyboardSubtitle: Compose shots, polish prompts, render takes
stepHeader.assemblySubtitle: Assemble the timeline and export the final video
stepHeader.vaultSubtitle: Manage characters, scenes, and props for this project
stepHeader.storyboardComposerSubtitle: Compose the frame list and render each shot
stepHeader.motionSubtitle: Generate video clips from your storyboard frames
stepHeader.voiceSubtitle: Bind a voice to each character, generate dialogue audio line-by-line
stepHeader.mixSubtitle: Multi-track mixing · timeline editing · volume balance
stepHeader.exportSubtitle: Pick resolution and format, render the final cut

voiceClone.title: Clone new voice
voiceClone.dropHint: Drop audio file or click to pick
voiceClone.labelPlaceholder: e.g. Lin Mo voice actor / lead male
voiceClone.cloning: AI is cloning the voice — may take 10-30s...

voicePicker.title: Pick voice
voicePicker.cloneEmptyBody: Upload a 10-20s reference clip and let AI clone a custom voice.
voicePicker.cloneNeedsSeries: Link this project to a series first — cloned voices are shared at series level.
voicePicker.confirmDelete: Delete this voice? Characters using it will become unbound.
voicePicker.designEmptyBody: Describe the voice you want (e.g. 'warm 30-something female') and AI generates a custom one.
voicePicker.designNeedsSeries: Link this project to a series first — designed voices are shared at series level.

dialogueAudio.title: Dialogue Audio
dialogueAudio.noVoiceBound: Bind a voice to the character in Cast first

storyboardGen.title: ✨ Generate shots from script
storyboardGen.checkTextHint: Needs at least 40 chars of script. Go back to the Script step to paste or edit.
storyboardGen.checkCharsHint: Click 提取实体 in the Script step first — AI uses character / scene info for better shot decomposition.
storyboardGen.willReplaceWarning: Continuing will wipe the existing {count} shots and replace them with AI-generated ones. Cannot be undone.
storyboardGen.freshHint: First-time generation — AI will split shots, place scenes, and assign characters.

castWorkbench.resetTemplateHint: Repopulate from name + description + composition template
castWorkbench.promptHintCharacter: Goal: one image fusing a head close-up with front/side/back views — a character reference sheet for downstream use.
castWorkbench.promptHintScene: Goal: wide environment establishing shot with no foreground subject.
castWorkbench.promptHintProp: Goal: prop product shot on a clean background, multi-angle when possible.
castWorkbench.emptyVariantsBody: Click Generate on the left to have AI produce reference images from your prompt.
castWorkbench.noneSelectedFooter: No reference picked — click a variant
castWorkbench.toastGenStartBody: Image generation usually takes 15-45 seconds, you can keep working.
castWorkbench.toastGenDoneBody: Variants added to the library, now {count} total.
castWorkbench.templateCharacterComposition: Composition: single split-frame image — head close-up on top, front / side / back three-view below. Unified lighting, clean neutral background, sharp silhouette — usable as a character reference sheet.
castWorkbench.templateSceneComposition: Composition: wide establishing shot of the environment, no foreground figures. Emphasize atmosphere + architecture/terrain. Lighting and palette match the scene's mood.
castWorkbench.templatePropComposition: Composition: product-photography style, clean neutral background, multiple angles when possible, emphasize material and detail.

voiceDesign.title: Design a new voice
voiceDesign.voicePromptPlaceholder: Describe gender, age, timbre, pace, mood. e.g. 'Mature gentle woman, around 30, clear bright tone with a hint of sweetness, moderate pace, warm and intelligent.'
voiceDesign.doneSaved: Voice added to your design library

previousFramesRail.title: Previous episode ending
previousFramesRail.hint: Use the previous episode's ending shots as visual continuity reference for this episode's opening.

nextHook.title: Hook for next episode
nextHook.subtitle: AI predicts how the next episode might open based on this one's ending, so you can audit the hooks you've planted.
nextHook.editPlaceholder: Edit or rewrite the hook prediction…

previousEpisode.firstEpisodeBody: This is the first episode of the series — no previous recap available.

seriesArtDirection.title: Series Style Baseline
seriesArtDirection.noBaseline: No baseline set for this series yet — pick any preset below and save
seriesArtDirection.emptySelection: Pick a preset below to begin
seriesArtDirection.v2Hint: Future: series-wide AI style analysis, reference mood-board, multi-style library.

cast.sectionEmptyCharacters: No characters appear in this episode yet
cast.emptyBody: Import a script in Step 1 and extract entities — characters, scenes, and props referenced in this episode will be aggregated here.
cast.addModalSubtitle: Choose how to establish identity for this asset
cast.addTabAiHint: Model generates a multi-view master sheet from description
cast.addTabUploadHint: Use existing artwork you already have
cast.placeholderFooter: Full generation / upload flow ships in the next release.
cast.fieldPersonaHint: optional · groups visual variants of the same person
cast.fieldPersonaPlaceholder: e.g. John (multiple looks share this persona)
cast.fieldVoiceHint: optional · used for TTS narration later
cast.fieldDescriptionAiPlaceholder: Description used by AI to generate the reference sheet
cast.aiTabHint: v1: creates a blank record. Trigger generation later from card detail. Full one-click flow ships next.
cast.seriesRequired: Episode not linked to a series — cannot manage shared assets
cast.voiceBindAdd: Bind a voice for this character

workspace.title: My Workspace
workspace.emptyHint: Choose a way to start creating
workspace.createProjectHint: Ideal for a single short video
workspace.confirmDeleteSeries: Are you sure you want to delete series "{title}"? This will not delete its projects.

project.workflowR2VDesc: 5-step streamlined flow, per-shot i2v / r2v generation mode toggle
project.workflowI2VDesc: Traditional 9-step flow, preserved for backward compatibility (StoryboardComposer + VideoGenerator)
project.contentScriptedDesc: Traditional flow: import script → extract entities → storyboard → generate video
project.contentFreeformDesc: Skip the script step: manage assets directly, write shot prompts manually
project.visualControlR2VDesc: New shots default to direct video generation (use @ to reference assets) — faster, tighter pacing
project.visualControlI2VDesc: New shots default to: generate first frame → review → then generate video. Maximum visual control
project.confirmDelete: Are you sure you want to delete project "{title}"?
project.globalStyleDesc: This style will be automatically applied to all asset generation and storyboard rendering. You can still override the style for specific items during generation.
project.customStyleHint: This description will be applied alongside the style preset (optional)
project.envConfigSub: DashScope-first setup, with optional OSS mirror and vendor-direct routing
project.configSaveFailed: Failed to save configuration. Please try again.
project.configLoadFailed: Failed to load configuration. Is the backend running?
project.requiredHint: DashScope API Key is required before using the app. OSS and vendor keys are optional unless you select vendor-direct mode.
project.cannotClose: This dialog cannot be closed until required fields are valid.
project.ossLocalFirst: Storage is local-first by default. OSS credentials are optional and only used as a cloud mirror.
project.ossMirrorDesc: When configured, generated media is stored locally and mirrored to OSS.
project.dashscopeMode: DashScope mode uses your DashScope API Key.
project.vendorMode: Vendor-direct mode requires the corresponding vendor API keys.
project.endpointsDesc: Custom API endpoint URLs. Leave empty to use defaults. Endpoint overrides are preserved regardless of provider mode.
project.promptConfigSub: Customize system prompts for AI polish stages
project.promptLoadFailed: Failed to load prompt configuration. Please try again.
project.promptEmptyHint: Leave a field empty to use the system default prompt. Custom prompts completely replace the default for that stage.

series.sharedAssetsEditHint: Assets generated in the episode editor will be automatically shared here
series.assetsSharedHint: Assets will be shared here after being generated in episodes
series.dragHint: Drag and drop a file here, or click to select
series.previewHint: AI has split the file into {count} episodes. Please confirm:
series.createSuccessDetail: Series "{title}" has been created with {count} episodes
series.importAssetsDesc: Import shared assets from another series
series.selectSource: Select a source series to import assets from
series.noSeriesAvailable: No other series available for import
series.importReview: Import {count} asset(s) from {source} to current series
series.deepCopyWarning: Assets will be deep-copied and independent from the source series.
series.seriesPromptConfigSub: Customize system prompts for AI polish stages
series.seriesPromptEmptyHint: Leave a field empty to use the system default. Series prompts apply to all episodes; episodes can override individually.
series.promptLoadFailed: Failed to load prompt configuration. Please try again.

assets.dragImageHint: Drag and drop an image here, or click to select
assets.descriptionNote: Please ensure the description matches the uploaded image. It will be used for generating other asset types.

storyboard.promptHint: Modify the prompt to refine the generated image.
storyboard.promptBuilderPlaceholder:
Enter prompt... 
Insert character: [character1:Name]
Insert camera: (camera: movement)
storyboard.overwriteConfirm: This will overwrite all current storyboard frames. Continue?
storyboard.aiInvalidOutput: AI model did not generate valid frames. Please click the button again.
storyboard.aiFormatRetry:
Storyboard generation failed: AI model output format error.

This is an occasional format issue. Retrying usually resolves it.
storyboard.confirmDeleteFrame: Are you sure you want to delete this frame?

video.renderingDesc: Stitching video, mixing audio, and burning subtitles...
video.exportReadyDesc: Your video is ready to be shared with the world.
video.exportHint: Configure your export settings and click "Start Render"

artDirection.inheritHint: This episode auto-inherits the series style. No need to redefine.
artDirection.overrideHint: This episode uses a custom style that differs from the series baseline.
artDirection.promotePromptTitle: This style is not yet the series baseline
artDirection.promotePromptHint: Click the button to promote the current style to series level.
artDirection.subtitle: Art Direction - Establish global visual standards
artDirection.selectStyleHint: Please select a style from the left panel first
artDirection.positivePromptHint: Will be automatically applied to all asset and storyboard generation
artDirection.fillNameAndPrompt: Please fill in style name and positive prompt
artDirection.styleAppliedBody: Episode style is now [{name}] — used for all subsequent generation.
artDirection.audioMixerFuture: Audio mixing will be available in a future update.
artDirection.previewBannerHint: Changes are not saved yet. Click 'Apply' below to commit, or 'Cancel preview' to revert to inheritance.
artDirection.overrideConfirmIntro: This episode currently inherits its style from the series. Continuing opens an 'episode-only' preview — changes need 'Apply' to save.
artDirection.overrideConfirmFooter: To stay in sync with the series, cancel.
artDirection.toastOverridePreviewingBody: Changes not saved yet — click 'Apply' to commit.

script.scriptEmpty: Script is empty — paste or type your script on the left, then click Extract Entities.
script.scriptPlaceholder: Paste novel or script content here...
script.analyzingScriptBody: AI is parsing the script and extracting characters/scenes/props — usually 20-60s, you can keep working.
script.confirmDelete: Are you sure you want to delete {name}?

models.seriesGenSettingsDesc: Configure models and aspect ratios for all episodes
models.loadSettingsFailed: Failed to load settings. Is the backend running?
models.motionFollowsAR: Motion follows storyboard aspect ratio automatically.

library.title: Asset Library
library.noAssetsHint: Assets will appear here after being generated in series or projects

voice.noDialogue: No dialogue found in this script.

assembly.selectFrameHint: Select a frame from the timeline to view video variants
assembly.noVideosHint: Go back to the Motion step to generate videos for this frame.
assembly.mergedVideoDesc: All selected clips have been stitched together. You can now proceed to add voiceovers and sound effects.
assembly.downloadFailed: Failed to download video. Please try again.
assembly.mixHint: Levels are mixed proportionally during the final merge. Dialogue defaults to 100 and BGM to 35 to avoid masking the voice.
assembly.exportSubtitle: {ready} / {total} frames selected — ready to merge into the final MP4.

motion.multiShotHint: Multi-shot mode generates narrative video with multiple camera switches
motion.proModeHint: Pro mode offers higher quality but takes longer

properties.selectStep: Select a step to view properties.
properties.assetOverviewDesc: Manage aspect ratios and view global style settings.
properties.tipEditStyle: Tip: Edit style in Step 2 (Art Direction)
properties.goToArtDirection: Go to Step 2 (Art Direction) to set up your project's visual style
properties.selectFrameToEdit: Select a frame to edit its details.
properties.tipConfigureAR: Tip: Use the sidebar gear icon to configure aspect ratios.
properties.noPromptYet: No prompt yet. Run storyboard generation to auto-fill.

character.tipConsistency: Keep the three images consistent for best results
character.generateFirstStatic: Please generate a {type} image first as a reference before generating motion video.
character.invalidAudioFile: Please upload a valid audio file (MP3, WAV, etc.)
character.noRefVideos: No reference videos available. Please generate Motion Reference videos in the Assets stage first.

vault.title: Consistency Vault
vault.genFailed: Generation failed, please try again later
vault.confirmDelete: Are you sure you want to delete this {type}?
vault.syncDescription:
Sync Description Note:

This will sync the latest descriptions from the Script page to all assets.
Existing images will not be deleted, but new descriptions will be used for future generations.

Continue?
vault.syncDescHint: Sync descriptions from Script page to all assets
vault.r2vBannerDesc: These assets will be used as direct references for video generation. High-quality, consistent assets produce better R2V results.

creator.title: Motion Creator
creator.r2vNeedSlot: R2V mode requires at least one character slot (@Ref_A)
creator.promptPlaceholder: Describe the action and camera movement...
creator.noFrameImage: No image for this frame yet
creator.noRefImagesAvailable: No character images available. Create characters in the Assets step first.
creator.refImagesHint: Select 1-9 character reference images. Use character1, character2... in prompt.
creator.noRefVideosAvailable: No reference videos available. Generate Motion References in the Assets step first.

storyboardR2V.emptyBody: Generate shots from the script in one click (recommended), or add manually to start from scratch.
storyboardR2V.genToastStartBody: Running AI analysis on the script — usually 30-90s, you can keep working.
storyboardR2V.genToastDoneBody: Shots are now in the storyboard — pick first frames or jump straight into video.
storyboardR2V.promptPlaceholder: Describe this shot... Use @ to reference assets
storyboardR2V.noAssetsHint: Add characters, scenes or props in the Asset Vault first
storyboardR2V.r2vBannerDesc: These assets will be used as direct references for video generation. High-quality, consistent assets produce better R2V results.
storyboardR2V.missingRefs: {model} needs reference images. Use @ in the prompt to attach a character / scene / prop — at least one required.
storyboardR2V.promptExpandHotkeys: Esc to cancel · Cmd/Ctrl+Enter to save
storyboardR2V.polishFeedbackPlaceholder: Want to tweak? Type feedback for another iteration...
storyboardR2V.polishErrorIsConfiguredFalse: LLM not configured (missing DASHSCOPE_API_KEY). Please check settings.
storyboardR2V.polishErrorApi: Model call failed. Please retry or check your network.
storyboardR2V.polishErrorJsonParse: Model returned invalid response. Try again or simplify the prompt.
storyboardR2V.polishErrorMissingKeys: Model returned incomplete bilingual result. Please retry.
storyboardR2V.polishWarningModelEcho: Model made no notable changes. Add specific feedback below (camera, lighting, mood) and retry.
storyboardR2V.artStyleHint: Global art style (click to edit in Art Direction)
storyboardR2V.shotCastEmpty: No characters referenced · @ character to add
storyboardR2V.i2vNeedsFirstFrame: Upload or generate a first frame before generating video.
storyboardR2V.r2vRefsStatusEmpty: No references · @ character / scene / prop in the prompt
storyboardR2V.t2iHeroBody: I2V needs a starting image. Let AI generate one from your prompt, or upload your own.
storyboardR2V.t2iHeroGenerateEnabledTooltip: Use the prompt above to generate the first frame (shared with the video generation prompt)
storyboardR2V.t2iCompactRerollTooltip: Generate another first frame with the current prompt (added to candidates)

assetCard.seriesSharedTooltip: Shared across the entire series. Edits propagate to all episodes that reference this asset.
assetCard.episodeLocalTooltip: Local to this episode only. Edits don't affect other episodes.
